title: NoHurtCamFix
description: Disable camera hurt shake and remove first-person hand shake when taking damage
body:
**Unlike the other NoHurtCam**, this mod fully stabilizes your view, including when your hands are hit, giving you a smooth, uninterrupted gameplay experience. Ideal for PvP, exploration, or anyone tired of the annoying screen jitter on damage.

Features:

Completely removes camera shake from all sources of damage.

- Works seamlessly in first-person view.

- Lightweight and client-side only.

- Compatible with Minecraft 1.8.9 and Forge mods.
